text: Google for Health - Advancing Cutting-edge AI Capabilities WeГўВҖВҷve been investing in AI for more than a decade ГўВҖВ” leading to breakthrough AI systems like AlphaFold, and our foundational model, Gemini. These are unlocking incredible opportunities in medicine through the creation of more personalized, accessible, and effective solutions.

With a bold and responsible approach, weГўВҖВҷre taking the next steps to make this technology even more helpful for everyone. From X-rays to digital health records, medicine is inherently multimodal. Our Gemini models were built from the ground up for multimodality, enabling them to reason across complex informationГўВҖВ”from medical images to the lengthy context of a patientГўВҖВҷs entire health history.

This sophisticated understanding helps clinicians and researchers find key insights within complex patient data, unlocking new possibilities for care and discovery. Get hands-on with our open models and resources to build the next generation of health applications Enabling AI innovation in healthcare with open models We believe that the future of health AI is a collaborative one.

By providing access to powerful, open models, we can help accelerate the pace of innovation and potentially unlock new solutions to pressing health challenges. MedGemma, our most capable open model for multimodal medical text and image comprehension, is optimized for developing healthcare applications, from helping analyze radiology images to summarizing notes for physicians.

Additionally, TxGemma is a collection of open models designed to improve the efficiency of therapeutic development by understanding and predicting the properties of therapeutic entities like small molecules, chemicals, and proteins.
